text: Hey love, you want to just do takeout tonight? Too tired to cook after the clinic 😅
Yes please!! Thai or pizza?
Thai for sure. Ordering now, should be here by 7 x
mom can dad pick me up from soccer tomorrow? coach said practice is longer 😊
Yes sweetheart, Dad's got you. Bring your art folder home, I want to see the new drawing! xx
ok!! love you 💚
Hey sweetheart just checking in, haven't heard from you in a few days 🙂 everything ok?
Yes Mum sorry, the clinic and the show prep have been mad!! I'm good. I'll pop by Sunday with Emma
Lovely. Bring the lad some of that soda bread if you've any left. Miss you baby xx
did you see Hausermann posted the new Cattleya flask list?? 😭 we need to talk before the show
Dottie I already ordered two of the percivaliana crosses lol. miss you, let's catch up properly soon
of course you did 🥰 coffee this weekend? I want to hear your staging plan for the regional
hey are we still doing dinner friday or nah
yes omg been looking forward to it all week, 7pm still good?
perfect see u then!! maybe drinks after too, we'll see 😂
Jean — do you have the final entry count for the regional? Membership wants it for the program.
Six entries from me — two cattleyas, a paph, two phals and the dendrobium. I'll send the tag list tonight.
Perfect, thank you. That puts us at 84 across the society. Big year.
Home in 20. Emma's forms signed on the counter.
Perfect. Grabbed shepherd's pie from O'Reilly's, no cooking tonight.
Meeting ran late. Can you cover Emma's art class pickup?
Got it, I'll leave the clinic by 3:15.
Ecobee says the greenhouse dipped to 61 overnight.
Saw it. Bumped the setpoint, fogger is on.
Basketball practice ran over, home by 8.
Fine. Emma finished her math worksheet, told her yes to a snack.
Reminder — CPA said your CE receipts by Nov 1.
Yes, on the Drive folder already. I'll send Richard the link.
Do we need anything from Kroger on the way home?
Milk, brown eggs, Barry's Tea 80 count if they have it.
Kate called the school looking for you.
Ugh. I'll call her back after last patient.
You up? Emma had a bad dream, wants you.
Coming. Tell her two minutes.
Show weekend — hotel confirmation forwarded to your Gmail.
Got it. Booked the U-Haul for Friday morning already.
Craig school potluck Thursday — sign up for something?
Colcannon. I'll do it before the 6 AM yoga.
Emma wants to sleep at Sophia's Saturday, thoughts?
Fine with me if it's not a show weekend. Confirm it's the 10th.
Van battery is going. Costco tomorrow?
Yes. Get one with the good warranty this time.
Snowing already on the way to school.
Watch the bridge on Riverside, it ices first.
Morning love. Did you take your magnesium?
Yes Mom. You take your Alendronate today?
Just now with a full glass of water. Standing up for the half hour.
Good. I'll be over Friday afternoon with groceries.
Bring Emma if she's not in art class. I miss her giggle.
She'll come. She wants to show you her portrait project.
Father Byrne asked after you at Mass again.
Tell him I'll come with you Sunday before the society meeting.
The tea you sent is lovely. That's the good Barry's.
Only the good Barry's for you, Mom.
Dr. Brennan's office called about my blood work.
What did they say? Do you want me to call for you?
They said Monday morning to review. Yes please dear.
On it. I'll call at 8 sharp and text you the plan.
Patrick and the kids arriving November 1?
Yes, Sunday. I'll pick them up from CMH around 4.
I made brown bread. Bringing you a loaf Friday.
Bless you. Emma will lose her mind.
The choir wants me to solo at Christmas Eve.
Do it Mom. You've got the voice. We'll all be there.
Mom can I have art class friend over Saturday?
Which friend, love?
Sophia. She helped me with the watercolor portrait.
Yes if her mom is fine. I'll text Jennifer.
Coach said practice moved to 4:30 Thursday.
Got it. Dad will drop, I'll pick up after Kate's.
Mom look what I drew!!
Beautiful. Show me Friday, I want to see it in person.
Can you sign the field trip form?
Left it on the fridge. Bring it up if I forget in the morning.
Grandma said I can help her bake Sunday!!
Wear the apron with the bees. She loves that one.
Sophia's mom said yes to Saturday!!
Great. 1 to 5, quiet in the greenhouse zone.
Sleepover next weekend??
Not the show weekend, love. The one after.
Sis, flights booked for Nov 1. Landing CMH 3:58pm.
Got it. I'll be at arrivals. Kate's counting the days.
Kids are excited to see Emma. Any dietary things?
Ella still off dairy? I'll get almond milk.
Yes still off. Thanks for remembering.
Always. Mom wants an Irish stew night that week.
Perfect. Also — call Mom Sunday? She sounded flat.
I always do. Will keep an extra eye on her mood.
Karen and I making it to the show Dec 12?
You are on the volunteer list already. Saturday 10-2.
How's the Paph rothschildianum spike?
Two spikes, both staked. First bud due mid-Nov.
You're going to sweep the regional.
I'll take Second and be happy. Dorothy has a killer Cattleya.
Dinner Refectory Thursday?
Yes. 7pm. Book it.
Book club, I'm on chapter 12 of The Searcher.
Same. I love Trude and I don't trust her.
Richard says your CE receipts by Nov 1.
Yes. He and I are already talking about it directly.
Yoga tomorrow?
6 AM home practice. Come over if you want.
Kate's cake for her birthday — I can pick up from Cornerstone.
Bless you. Vanilla with raspberry, no chocolate.
How's Craig doing with the basketball season?
Tired but happy. Team is scrappy this year.
Show weekend — I'll cover carpool for you if you need.
Yes please. Friday afternoon and Saturday morning.
Wine after your presentation Saturday?
Please. I'll need it more than the audience will.
Your Paph is going to embarrass me at regionals.
You always say that and you always place higher.
Bench temp holding at 58 overnight, my Cattleyas hate me.
Bump the day rise, split the difference. 62-72.
Saw your talk slides for Oct 17 — the media chart is beautiful.
You still want the ten-minute Q&A after?
Yes. And keep the humidity numbers on the last slide.
Done.
Bringing you flask seedlings from Windswept next weekend.
You are a saint. I'll bake soda bread for the trade.
Judges list for Dec confirmed, forwarding now.
Perfect. I'll cross-check with our AOS list tonight.
Room 3 chair squeaking again, submitted ticket.
Thanks. Loupe stand also needs the tighten.
Lunch at Northstar today?
Yes. 12:30, before the 2pm perio.
Nancy said Dr. G is running late from the crown.
Copy. I'll do the pre-check on my next.
Any CE course you'd recommend for the last 9 hours?
Watsu perio online course. 4 hours, decent.
Your wrist splints holding up?
Yes. Karen's PT is helping. Cortisone if December's still bad.
Nancy's grand-baby update — she is smitten.
Send her the coffee gift card from us both.
Perio protocol update from the lunch and learn — worth reading.
Send it. I'll skim tonight.
Can you swap Thursday shift with me? Anniversary.
Yes. I'll take Thursday, you take my Wednesday.
Craig Dean: Emma's teeth check moved to next Wed.
Jean: Got it, I'll cover it. Room 2, 3:30.
Patrick: Nov 1 flights locked, will forward itinerary.
Jean: Perfect. Kate is counting the days.
Kate: Made soda bread, freezing two loaves for you.
Jean: Bless you Mom. Emma will lose her mind.
Craig Dean: Basketball game Friday night 7pm.
Jean: Emma and I will be there in the bleachers.
